seo.metaTitle: White-Label Business Email for Service Providers | Hostopia
seo.metaDescription: Deliver secure, professional business email under your brand. Hostopia's white-label email platform supports domain-based and consumer email with flexible packaging, expert migrations, and 24/7 support.

hero.headline: Secure, Professional Email — Delivered Under Your Brand
hero.subheadline: Email is mission-critical infrastructure. Every business needs it, every customer expects it, and the provider who delivers it becomes the anchor of that relationship.
hero.description: Hostopia's white-label Business Email gives you a scalable, enterprise-grade email platform to resell under your brand. Domain-based business email, consumer email, or both — with flexible packaging, expert migrations, and 24/7 end-user support.

items.title: Professional domain-based email
items.body: Business email on their own domain builds credibility and trust with every message sent.

items.title: Ad-free branded webmail
items.body: A modern, feature-rich webmail experience with calendars, contacts, tasks, and online storage — no ads, ever.

items.title: Enterprise-grade security
items.body: Anti-virus protection, configurable spam filtering, trusted/blocked sender lists, and optional backups.

items.title: Access anywhere
items.body: Full IMAP, POP, and SMTP support. Works with Outlook, Apple Mail, mobile clients, and webmail — any device, anywhere.

features.heading: A Complete Email Platform — Packaged Your Way
features.intro: Hostopia handles the infrastructure, security, and support. You control the packaging, pricing, and customer experience.

cards.title: Flexible Email Tiers
cards.body: Domain-based business email, consumer email, or both. Flexible storage tiers at 3 GB, 6 GB, 9 GB, and 12 GB — so you can tailor plans, upsell premium options, and monetize overages.

cards.title: Enterprise-Grade Security
cards.body: Built-in anti-virus, configurable spam filtering, trusted and blocked sender lists, and optional backup. Security that SMBs need but rarely configure on their own.

cards.title: Built-In Productivity Tools
cards.body: Shared calendars, contacts, tasks, and traffic alerts keep SMB teams synchronized — turning email into a lightweight collaboration platform.

cards.title: Expert Email Migration
cards.body: Hostopia's proprietary migration tools and experienced team move users from legacy platforms with zero downtime. No data loss, no disruption, no customer churn.

partnerAdvantage.heading: The Anchor Product That Holds Your Portfolio Together
partnerAdvantage.intro: Email is the highest-usage digital product in your stack. The partner who delivers it becomes the partner SMBs depend on every day.

items.title: Create a sticky, high-usage anchor
items.body: Email is used daily. Once an SMB is on your email platform, switching costs are high and retention is strong — making it the foundation for long-term customer value.

items.title: Bundle with everything you sell
items.body: Email pairs with domains, hosting, websites, and connectivity. Bundle it to increase ARPU, reduce churn, and deliver a single-provider experience SMBs prefer.

items.title: Consolidate legacy platforms
items.body: Replace fragmented, outdated email systems with a single modern platform. Hostopia's migration team handles the transition — you reduce operational complexity and cost.

lifecycleFit.heading: The Foundation of Every Business Relationship
lifecycleFit.intro: Email is the first digital product most businesses use every day. It anchors the entire portfolio — from domains and websites to marketing and security.

steps.title: Build a Brand
steps.body: Business Email on a custom domain establishes professional identity from day one.

steps.title: Get Online
steps.body: Websites and hosting launch the digital presence.

steps.title: Get Found
steps.body: SEO, directories, and reputation management drive visibility.

steps.title: Grow
steps.body: Ecommerce, email marketing, and advanced services drive revenue growth.

lifecycleFit.positioning: Position email as the anchor product that bundles with everything — domains, hosting, websites, and connectivity. Every customer needs it, every product benefits from it, and switching costs keep retention high.

cta.headline: Ready to Make Business Email Your Anchor Product?
cta.body: Connect with Hostopia to launch white-label Business Email, migrate existing users with zero downtime, and bundle it with the connectivity and digital services you already sell.
